sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { sendContactMessage } from '../../services/emailService'; import './Contact.css'; const CONTACT_INFO = [ { icon:'📍', label:'Address', val:'Delhi NCR, India' }, { icon:'📞', label:'Phone', val:'+91 72900 81087', href:'tel:+917290081087' }, { icon:'✉️', label:'Email', val:'info@fashionrunway.in', href:'mailto:info@fashionrunway.in' }, { icon:'⏰', label:'Working Hours', val:'Mon – Sat, 10 AM to 7 PM IST' }, ]; export default function Contact() { const [form, setForm] = useState({ name:'', email:'', phone:'', subject:'', message:'' }); const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle'); const handleChange = e => setForm(p => ({ ...p, [e.target.name]: e.target.value })); const handleSubmit = async e => { e.preventDefault(); setStatus('loading'); try { await sendContactMessage(form); } catch { /* POC — continue */ } setStatus('success'); setForm({ name:'', email:'', phone:'', subject:'', message:'' }); }; return (
Reach Out

Contact Us

Questions about events, applications, or partnerships? We're here.

{/* Left info */}
Get in Touch

Let's Talk Fashion

Whether you're a model, designer, brand partner, or just curious — our team is ready to assist you. Drop us a message and we'll respond within 24 hours.

{CONTACT_INFO.map(c => (
{c.icon}
{c.label} {c.href ? {c.val} : {c.val} }
))}
{/* Quick apply CTA */}

Quick Apply

Ready to apply? Use one of our direct application forms:

Apply as Model Apply as Designer Join Workshop
{/* Form */}

Send a Message

{status === 'success' && (
✅ Thank you! We've received your message and will get back to you within 24 hours.
)}
